Section 5802, , , , established National Natural Resources Conservation Foundation as a charitable and nonprofit corporation to promote innovative solutions to the problems associated with the conservation of natural resources on private lands.Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 353110 Stat. 1010Apr. 4, 1996

Section 5803, , , , directed administration of the Foundation by a Board of Trustees and set forth provisions relating to its composition and operation.Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 354110 Stat. 1011Apr. 4, 1996
Section 5804, , , , related to appointment and hiring of officers and employees by the Board.Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 355110 Stat. 1012Apr. 4, 1996

Section 5805, , , ; , , , related to corporate powers and obligations of the Foundation.Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 356110 Stat. 1013Pub. L. 107–171, title II, § 2506116 Stat. 274Apr. 4, 1996May 13, 2002
Section 5806, , , , authorized provision of administrative services and support by the Department of Agriculture.Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 357110 Stat. 1014Apr. 4, 1996

Section 5807, , , ; , , , directed auditing of Foundation accounts by the Attorney General.Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 358110 Stat. 1014Pub. L. 105–225, § 6(b)112 Stat. 1499Apr. 4, 1996Aug. 12, 1998
Section 5808, , , , related to release of the United States from liability for any debt, default, act, or omission of the Foundation.Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 359110 Stat. 1014Apr. 4, 1996
Section 5809, , , , authorized appropriations.Pub. L. 104–127, title III, § 360110 Stat. 1014Apr. 4, 1996
